infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RUTRIX needs the camera to photograph road surface defects and potholes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RUTRIX lets you pick road photos from your gallery for AI detection.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RUTRIX records GPS coordinates for each pothole on the field map.
infoPlist.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: RUTRIX connects to your detection server on the local network.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to scan road defects with RUTRIX.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow location so RUTRIX can pin each pothole on the map.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow gallery access to upload road photos to RUTRIX.
